title: Policy (GSM v1)
description: Measurable boundary condition on one or more Purposes, translating Directive directional intent into a bounded, falsifiable envelope.

guard.description: Optional plain text CEL expression conforming to the applicability-guard CEL profile (axis-predicate normal form). When null, the policy applies unconditionally within its owning System. Parsed by the Definition Manager.

x-sie-validation.structure: Conjunction (AND) of single-axis predicates: AND(pred1, pred2, ..., predN) where each predI is: Reference OP Literal.
restrictions: One predicate per axis: at most one comparison per (archetype, propertyPath) combination.
Left operand: archetype property reference only — no computed values, no function calls.
Right operand: static literal value or array — no computed values.
No nested connectives: no OR within the guard (pure conjunction).
No function calls: no size(), has(), exists(), or custom functions.
No cross-property comparisons: each predicate compares a single property to a literal.
IN array MUST have >= 2 elements (single value: use ==). NOT_IN array MUST have >= 1 element.
Array elements MUST be unique and type-compatible.
x-sie-validation.rationale: Axis-predicate normal form enables deterministic overlap and containment detection for conflict analysis and coverage checking.

predicate.description: Plain text CEL expression conforming to the property-assertion CEL profile. Evaluates to boolean when the constraint is satisfied. Always required. Parsed by the Definition Manager.

restrictions: No imperative constructs, no variable declarations.
When toleranceMode = AGGREGATED, predicate MUST be in metric-comparison form: Reference ComparisonOp Literal.
x-sie-validation.rationale: Property-assertion CEL profile ensures predicates are statically analyzable for conflict detection and coverage analysis.

toleranceMode.description: The tolerance mode determining what constitutes a violation. Required. Determines which temporal fields are valid.

temporalWindow.description: ISO8601 duration string (e.g., 'PT5M'). Required when toleranceMode is AGGREGATED or SUSTAINED. Null for INSTANTANEOUS mode.

temporalAggregation.description: Temporal aggregation mode. Required when toleranceMode is AGGREGATED or SUSTAINED. Null for INSTANTANEOUS. AGGREGATED mode: collect numeric metric over temporalWindow, aggregate, compare against predicate threshold. SUSTAINED mode: evaluate predicate at each sample point, aggregate compliance ratio. The toleranceMode discriminates what is aggregated; temporalAggregation specifies how.

sustainedThreshold.description: Minimum compliance ratio (e.g., 0.99 = 'true 99% of the time'). Required when toleranceMode = SUSTAINED; must not be set otherwise.

ToleranceMode.description: Tolerance mode — the primary discriminant of a Policy's violation boundary. INSTANTANEOUS: predicate fails at any observation point. AGGREGATED: aggregated numeric value exceeds threshold over temporal window. SUSTAINED: compliance ratio falls below threshold over temporal window.

operationalizingDirectives.description: Derived from Operationalization chains: SELECT DISTINCT o.directive FROM operationalization o WHERE o.policy = THIS AND o.directive IS NOT NULL.
